message:
feat(search-core): add filesystem bridge and expand search core library

- search-core/src/lib.rs: update search core library with new module
  declarations and integration points
- search-core/src/fs_bridge.rs: new filesystem bridge module providing
  indexed search access to the project filesystem for MCP tool queries

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
